form.name_max_length: Collection name must be less than 255 characters
form.name_placeholder_create: Give a title to the collection

delete_modal.title: Delete collection
delete_modal.page_count: This collection has {pageCount} {pageCount, plural, one {page} other {pages}}. Choose what happens to them.
delete_modal.transfer_description: Move all pages to another collection before deleting. Pages and their permissions are preserved.
delete_modal.transfer_warning: Moved pages will inherit the permissions of the selected collection.
delete_modal.delete_with_pages_description: Permanently delete the collection and all its pages. This action can't be undone.

list.remove_error: Failed to remove page from collection.
list.remove_search_criteria: Remove the search criteria to see all pages
list.remove_filters: Remove the filters to see all pages
list.no_pages_description: This collection doesn't have any pages right now.

upgrade_flow.title: Upgrade to unlock Wiki
upgrade_flow.description: Unlock public pages, version history, shared pages, real-time collaboration, and workspace pages for wikis, company-wide docs, and knowledge bases with Plane Pro.

nested_pages_download_banner.title: Nested pages require a paid plan. Upgrade to unlock.
